body.title: Igor reading session visibility — track record and meta-view
body.result: D334: unified reading tool built — graph-based runs, blob fetch, facia+habits seeded, 10 commands
body.description: Igor can see the extraction procedure but not which books were read, in what order, quality, or track record. Build tool/habit to give him meta-visibility: reading_list status, node counts per book, session timeline, extraction quality signals. Helps Igor calibrate his own reading quality.
